title: [YTP] Double D Yiffs Himself Into A Coma
description:
All is not well in the Cul-De-Sac. Our hero, Double D, is visited by a stranger, who, without any warning, hits him in the face with a large penis. Traumatized by the devious and random incident, Double D begins to yiff and hyperventilate. This causes a coma and slight brain-death in the entire backlobe of his brain. He quickly runs to see his physician, Dr. Eddy. There he has a mental breakdown, proving the severity of his condition. The only treatment Dr. Eddy can prescribe is having him beaten with a bed. The treatment is mildly successful, though Double D develops a tendency to lick windows and make strange faces. They go to the home of Dr. Eddy's fellow colleague, Professor Ed, to see  if he can solve Double D's precarious condition. Upon arrival they meet Professor Ed's whore, Sarah, who is upset that she lost Left 4 Dead and has sold her soul to Satan to get it back, fruitlessly. Dr. Eddy practices his long-time and strange enjoyment of the smell of Professor Ed's armpits and semen. Dr. Eddy then explains Double D's condition to Professor Ed. They discuss treastment options, when Dr. Eddy comes up with a solution, and laughs heartily. Unbeknownst to the gang, the radioactivity of their neighborhood mutates Jonny the Wood Boy into a giraffe, causing him to have dementia and hear "voices" in his head. Heeding the voices, he violently murders his friend Plank. His personality divides into something similar to Dr. Jeckel and Mr. Hyde, and thusly he renames himself Dr. Fucker, all the while dedicating himself to ruining the lives of everyone around him. Dr. Eddy, Professor Ed, and Double D catch on to Dr. Fucker's dastardly plot and gather their cyborg clones to hunt him down. He escapes, but not until the Eds alter the space-time continuum and hide behind a street pole to wait for him in ambush. The Ed's suffer a casualty as one of the Ed clones is crushed from the altered space and dies. After capturing Dr. Fucker, they enlist the help of Deepercutt, who tortures Dr. Fucker with his dick. The brutal torturing becomes too traumatizing for Dr. Eddy's mind and it deteriorates, making him go temporarily insane and scream about "sretnilps". They hand Dr. Fucker over to the local authorities, and receive a jar of nickels as payment. The Ed Gang celebrate by purchasing cocks and Bowser's Sourpuss Bread. But Dr. Eddy has a sinister and disturbing look on his face... he is far from alright.

God I have fun doing these

Honors:

#83 - Top Favorited (This Week) - News & Politics

Wow McMangos and CaptainOhYeah favorited this :D
